sqlMap.select: SELECT listcnt, ispreview, previewlistvalue, previewcontentvalue FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION WHERE tenantid = #v_TENANTID# AND memberid = #v_MEMBERID#
SELECT memberid FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION WHERE tenantid = #v_TENANTID# AND memberid = #v_MEMBERID#

SELECT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, B.updateStatus, A.title, A.memberid, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN A.membername ELSE A.membername2 END AS membername, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS regdate, B.status AS confirmstatus, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.confirmdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS confirmdate, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.updatedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS updatedate, IFNULL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount, B.commentStatus, B.shareStatus, (case when commentStatus = 1 or shareStatus = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as totalstatus FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE (B.status = 0 OR B.commentstatus = 1 OR B.sharestatus = 1) AND A.status != '2' AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND B.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.regdate AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.regdate
AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# ORDER BY
IMPORTANCE CONFIRMSTATUS COMMENTSTATUS HASFILE TITLE MEMBERNAME REGDATE STATUS DESC
totalstatus DESC, B.updatedate DESC, A.regdate DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid) CNT FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE (B.status = 0 OR B.commentstatus = 1 OR B.sharestatus = 1) AND A.status != 2 AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.regdate AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.regdate

SELECT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS regdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.enddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS enddate, A.option, A.content, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN A.membername ELSE A.membername2 END AS membername, IFNULL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount, B.status confirmstatus, B.updateStatus, B.commentStatus, B.shareStatus, A.companyId, (SELECT extensionattribute2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER F WHERE A.memberid = F.cn AND A.tenantid = F.tenant_id) as userImageFile FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.MEMBERID = C.CN LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE A.circularid = #circularID# AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY A.circularid

SELECT A.circularuserid, A.circularid, A.memberid, A.membername, A.membername2, A.status, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.confirmdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS confirmdate, A.updatestatus, A.updatedate, A.commentstatus, A.tenantid, B.cn, B.displayname, B.displayname2, B.mail FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER A LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.memberid = B.cn AND A.tenantid = B.tenant_id WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
AND B.displayname LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#),'%')
ORDER BY FIELD(A.memberid, (SELECT memberID FROM TBL_CIRCULAR WHERE circularid = #circularID#)) DESC, A.memberid ASC

SELECT A.memberid, A.membername, A.membername2, B.title FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_BM B ON A.circularbmid = B.circularbmid WHERE A.circularbmid = #circularBMId# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
SELECT circularfileid, filesize, filename, filepath FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FILE WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT A.circularbmid, A.title, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS regdate, (SELECT membername FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER WHERE circularbmid = A.circularbmid ORDER BY circularbmuserid LIMIT 1) membername, (SELECT COUNT(*) - 1 FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER WHERE circularbmid = A.circularbmid) membernamecount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BM A WHERE A.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#

SELECT A.circularbmid, A.memberid, BB.company, BB.description, BB.title, A.membername, BB.mail FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT D.CN, D.DISPLAYNAME, D.COMPANY, D.title, D.MAIL, D.DESCRIPTION FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# UNION ALL SELECT B.cn, B.DISPLAYNAME, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 as COMPANY, a.title, b.mail, C.DISPLAYNAME AS DESCRIPTION FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID#) BB ON A.memberid = BB.cn WHERE A.circularbmid = #circularBMId# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY memberid
SELECT COUNT(circularid) FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER WHERE updatestatus = 1 AND circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN A.membername ELSE A.membername2 END AS membername, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS regdate, B.status AS confirmstatus, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.confirmdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS confirmdate, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.updatedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS updatedate, B.updatestatus, IFNULL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE A.STATUS != '2' AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.memberid != #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.regdate AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.regdate
ORDER BY IMPORTANCE CONFIRMSTATUS COMMENTSTATUS HASFILE TITLE MEMBERNAME REGDATE STATUS DESC
ORDER BY A.regdate DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CIRCULARID) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.STATUS != '2' AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.memberid != #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.regdate AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.regdate

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.status = 2 AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND A.memberid = #memberID# AND A.memberid = B.memberid AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.regdate AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.regdate

SELECT DISTINCT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN A.membername ELSE A.membername2 END AS membername, B.status AS confirmstatus, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS regdate, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.confirmdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS confirmdate, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.updatedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS updatedate, IFNULL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE A.status = 2 AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND A.companyid =#companyID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.regdate AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.regdate
AND A.memberid = #memberID# AND A.memberid = B.memberid AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY A.circularID ORDER BY
IMPORTANCE CONFIRMSTATUS COMMENTSTATUS HASFILE TITLE MEMBERNAME REGDATE STATUS DESC
A.regdate DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
SELECT * FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER WHERE memberid = #memberId# AND tenantid = #tenantId# AND companyid = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.status != 2 AND B.UPDATESTATUS IN (0, 1) AND A.memberid = b.memberid AND A.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.regdate AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.regdate

SELECT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN A.membername ELSE A.membername2 END AS membername, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS regdate, B.status AS confirmstatus, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.confirmdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS confirmdate, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.updatedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS updatedate, B.updatestatus, IFNULL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE A.memberid = #memberID# AND A.memberid = B.memberid AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.status != 2 AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.regdate AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.regdate
AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) GROUP BY A.circularid ORDER BY
IMPORTANCE CONFIRMSTATUS COMMENTSTATUS HASFILE TITLE MEMBERNAME REGDATE STATUS DESC
A.regdate DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
SELECT circularfoldername FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER WHERE circularfolderid = #folderId# AND memberid = #memberId# AND tenantid = #tenantId#

SELECT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN A.membername ELSE A.membername2 END AS membername, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS regdate, B.status AS confirmstatus, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.confirmdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS confirmdate, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.updatedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS updatedate, IFNULL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount, B.updatestatus FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE ((B.updatestatus = '2' AND A.memberid = #memberID#) OR (B.updatestatus = '2' AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND B.deletestatus = 0)) AND B.memberID = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
GROUP BY A.circularid ORDER BY
IMPORTANCE CONFIRMSTATUS COMMENTSTATUS HASFILE TITLE MEMBERNAME REGDATE STATUS DESC
A.regdate DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid) CNT FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE ((B.updatestatus = '2' AND A.memberid = #memberID#) OR (B.updatestatus = '2' AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND B.deletestatus = 0)) AND B.memberID = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND A.membername2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN (SELECT * FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE memberid = #memberID#) B ON A.circularid = B.circularid JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER C ON B.circularfolderid = C.circularfolderid JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER D ON A.circularid = D.circularid AND D.memberid = #memberID# WHERE
B.circularfolderid = #folderID# AND
A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') AND
A.membername LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') AND
A.membername2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') AND
DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.regdate AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.regdate AND
D.updatestatus = '3' AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT distinct A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN A.membername ELSE A.membername2 END AS membername, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS regdate, d.status as confirmstatus, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(D.confirmdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS confirmdate, D.updatestatus, IFNULL(E.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, F.confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN (SELECT * FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE memberid = #memberID#) B ON A.circularid = B.circularid JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER C ON B.circularfolderid = C.circularfolderid JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER D ON A.circularid = D.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) E ON A.circularid = E.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) F ON A.circularid = F.circularid WHERE
B.circularfolderid = #folderID# AND
A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') AND
A.membername LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') AND
A.membername2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') AND
DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.regdate AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.regdate AND
D.memberid = #memberID# AND D.updatestatus = '3' AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY
IMPORTANCE CONFIRMSTATUS COMMENTSTATUS HASFILE TITLE MEMBERNAME REGDATE STATUS DESC
A.regdate DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
SELECT filepath, filename FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FILE WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND circularfileid = #circularFileID#
SELECT STATUS FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
SELECT cn AS memberid, displayname AS membername, displayname2 AS membername2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #memberID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT IFNULL(CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN name1 WHEN '2' THEN name2 WHEN '3' THEN name3 WHEN '4' THEN name4 END, '') name, width, colname FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LISTOPTION WHERE listtype = #listType# AND tenantid = #tenantID# ORDER BY sn

select.isEqual:
SELECT circularid, circularcommentid, circularuserid, circularcomment, memberid, membername, membername2, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS regdate, status, tenantid FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
circularcomment LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
membername LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')

SELECT A.circularid, A.circularcommentid, A.circularuserid, A.circularcomment, A.memberid, A.membername, membername2, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS regdate, A.status, B.status AS confirmStatus, A.tenantid FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE B ON A.circularcommentid = B.circularcommentid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.circularid = #circularID# AND B.memberid = #circularUserID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
A.membername LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
A.circularcomment LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
ORDER BY B.updateDate DESC

sqlMap.select: SELECT circularcommentstateid FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE WHERE circularcommentid = #circularCommentID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT B.cn AS memberid, B.displayName AS membername, B.displayName2 AS membername2, B.mail AS mail FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER A LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.memberid = B.cn AND A.tenantid = B.tenant_id WHERE A.circularid = #circularID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
AND A.memberid = #memberID#
AND A.status = 0

select.isEqual: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND ((status = 1 AND (circularuserid = #memberID# OR memberid = #memberID#)) OR (status = 0)) AND tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(B.circularcommentstateid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE B ON A.circularcommentid = B.circularcommentid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.circularid = #circularID# AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND B.status = 0 AND B.tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid AND A.companyid = B.companyid WHERE (B.status = 0 OR B.commentstatus = 1 OR B.sharestatus = 1) AND A.status != 2 AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND B.memberid = #userID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.status != '2' AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND B.memberid = #userID# AND A.memberid != #userID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.status != 2 AND B.UPDATESTATUS IN (0, 1) AND A.memberid = b.memberid AND A.memberid = #userID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.status = 2 AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND A.memberid = #userID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE (B.updatestatus = '2' AND A.memberid = #userID#) OR (B.updatestatus = '2' AND B.memberid = #userID# AND B.deletestatus = 0) AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE circularID = #circularID# AND memberID = #memberID# AND tenantID = #tenantID#

SELECT B.status AS commentstatus FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE B ON A.circularcommentid = B.circularcommentid WHERE A.circularid = #circularID# AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(circularlinkid) FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_link WHERE circularfolderid = #folderID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT A.memberid, BB.displayname, BB.description, BB.company, BB.title, IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(A.confirmdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '') AS confirmdate, BB.DEPARTMENT as deptid FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER A RIGHT JOIN (SELECT D.CN, D.DISPLAYNAME, D.COMPANY, D.title, D.MAIL, D.DESCRIPTION, D.DEPARTMENT FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# UNION ALL SELECT B.cn, B.DISPLAYNAME, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 as COMPANY, a.title, b.mail, C.DISPLAYNAME AS DESCRIPTION, A.DEPTID FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# ) BB ON A.memberid = BB.cn WHERE A.CIRCULARID=#circularID# AND A.TENANTID=#tenantID# AND A.STATUS = '1' AND a.memberid <> ( SELECT memberId FROM TBL_CIRCULAR WHERE circularId = #circularID# ) group by A.MEMBERID ORDER BY A.confirmdate desc LIMIT #start#, #perCount#

SELECT count(memberid) FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER A RIGHT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.memberid = B.cn WHERE A.CIRCULARID=#circularID# AND A.TENANTID=#tenantID# AND A.STATUS = '1' and A.TENANTID=B.tenant_id AND a.memberid <> ( SELECT memberId FROM TBL_CIRCULAR WHERE circularId = #circularID# )

SELECT A.department, a.company FROM (SELECT D.CN, D.DEPARTMENT, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as companyid, D.TENANT_ID, D.company FROM TBL_USERMASTER D UNION ALL SELECT B.cn, A.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, A.TENANT_ID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID) A WHERE A.CN = #circularUserID# and a.tenant_id = #tenantID# and a.companyid = #companyID# group by A.CN
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR (circularid, title, importance, option, content, hasfile, status, memberid, membername, membername2, regdate, enddate, tenantid, companyID) VALUES (#circularID#, #title#, #importance#, #option#, #content#, #hasFile#, #status#, #memberID#, #memberName#, #memberName2#, #regDate#, #endDate#, #tenantID#, #companyID#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_USER (circularuserid, circularid, memberid, membername, membername2, status, confirmdate, updatestatus, tenantid, companyid) VALUES (#circularUserID# ,#circularID#, #memberID#, #memberName#, #memberName2#, #status#, #confirmDate#, #updateStatus#, #tenantID#, #companyID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_FILE (circularid, filename, filesize, filepath, tenantid) VALUES (#circularID#, #fileName#, #fileSize#, #filePath#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION (circularoptionid, memberid, listcnt, ispreview, previewlistvalue, previewcontentvalue, tenantid) VALUES (#circularOptionID#, #memberID#, #listCnt#, #isPreview#, #previewListValue#, #previewContentValue#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_BM (title, memberid, regdate, tenantid, companyid) VALUES (#title#, #userID#, #nowDate#, #tenantID#, #companyID#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER (circularbmid, memberid, membername, membername2, tenantid) SELECT #circularBMId#, cn, displayname, displayname2, tenant_id FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #memberID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION (memberid, listcnt, ispreview, previewlistvalue, previewcontentvalue, tenantid) VALUES (#v_MEMBERID#, #v_LISTCOUNT#, #v_PREVIEW#, '50', '50', #v_TENANTID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER (circularfoldername, memberid, regdate, tenantid, companyid) VALUES (#folderName#, #memberId#, #regDate#, #tenantId#, #companyID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK (circularfolderid, circularid, memberid, tenantid) VALUES (#folderId#, #circularId#, #memberId#, #tenantId#)

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT (circularid, circularuserid, circularcomment, memberid, membername, membername2, regdate, status, tenantid) VALUES (#circularID#, #circularUserID#, #circularComment#, #memberID#, #memberName#, #memberName2#, #nowDate#, #status#, #tenantID#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE (circularcommentid, memberid, status, updateDate, tenantid) VALUES (#circularCommentID#, #memberID#, #status#, #nowDate#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR SET title = #title#, importance = #importance#, option = #option#, content = #content#, hasfile = #hasFile#, regdate = #regDate# WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET listcnt = #v_LISTCOUNT#, ispreview = #v_PREVIEW# WHERE tenantid = #v_TENANTID# AND memberid = #v_MEMBERID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET updatestatus = 1 WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND updatestatus = 0 AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET status = #status#, confirmdate = #confirmDate# WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET listcnt = #listCnt#, ispreview = #isPreview#, previewlistvalue = #previewListValue#, previewcontentvalue = #previewContentValue# WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND memberid = #memberID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ispreview = 0 WHERE tenantid = #v_TENANTID# AND memberid = #v_USERID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ispreview = 2, previewlistvalue = #v_LIST#, previewcontentvalue = #v_CONTENT#, listcnt = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE tenantid = #v_TENANTID# AND memberid = #v_USERID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ispreview = 1, previewlistvalue = #v_LIST#, previewcontentvalue = #v_CONTENT#, listcnt = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE tenantid = #v_TENANTID# AND memberid = #v_USERID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_BM SET title = #title#, regdate = #nowDate# WHERE circularbmid = #circularBMId# AND tenantid = #tenantID# AND memberid = #userID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR SET status = '1', endDate = #endDate# WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER SET circularfoldername = #folderName#, regdate = #regDate# WHERE circularfolderid = #folderId# AND memberid = #memberId# AND tenantid = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET updatestatus = '2' WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid IN ('', #memberID#) AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET updatestatus = #updateStatus# WHERE circularid = #circularId# AND memberid = #memberId# AND tenantid = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK SET circularfolderid = #folderId# WHERE circularid = #circularId# AND memberid = #memberId# AND tenantid = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET updatestatus = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT B.status as updatestatus FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B WHERE B.circularid = #circularID# AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND B.tenantid = #tenantID#) AS B) WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET commentStatus = #commentStatus#, shareStatus = #commentStatus#, deleteStatus = #deleteStatus#
updatedate = #nowDate#
updatedate = null
WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE SET status = #status#, confirmDate = #nowDate# WHERE circularcommentid IN (SELECT circularCommentID FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT WHERE circularid = #circularID# ) AND status = 0 AND memberID = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE SET status = #status#, updateDate = #nowDate# WHERE circularcommentid = #circularCommentID# AND memberID = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET shareStatus = #shareStatus#, deleteStatus = #deleteStatus#
updatedate = #nowDate#
updatedate = null
WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET deletestatus = 1 WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #userID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR SET title = #title#, importance = #importance#, option = #option#, content = #content#, hasfile = #hasFile#, status = #status#, regdate = #regDate# WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET status = 0 WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND updatestatus = 0 AND tenantid = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET deletestatus = 0, updatestatus = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT if (COUNT(circularID) = 0, CASE (SELECT status FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER WHERE circularID = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#) WHEN 0 THEN 0 WHEN 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END , 3 ) FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#) AS A) WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberID = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BM WHERE circularbmid = #circularBMId# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FILE WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER WHERE circularbmid = #circularBMId# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER WHERE circularfolderid = #deleteFolderId# AND memberid = #memberId# AND tenantid = #tenantId#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE WHERE circularcommentID = #circularCommentID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT WHERE circularID = #circularID# AND circularcommentID = #circularCommentID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
